_README: Use when a specific ticker has known issues with the default (yfinance) provider.
Schema: ticker -> { provider, fallback[], skip[], reason, added, validated }.
Fallback semantics: if primary returns EarningsFetchError, walk down fallback list.
Skip wins over fallback — providers in skip are never tried for that ticker.

INCIDENT 2026-05-09: previous MU entry routed away from yfinance based on a misdiagnosis (operator mistook real cyclical revenue ramp for syndication bug; calendar-vs-fiscal quarter mapping was the actual confusion, not bad data). All 3 providers were returning correct $23.86B Q2 FY26 actuals. Entry removed; system retained for genuine future bugs.
